title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 548.081 - Manner and place of execution
text:
548.081.  Manner and place of execution. — Such warrant shall authorize the peace officer or other person to whom directed to arrest the accused at any time and any place where he may be found within the state and to command the aid of all peace officers or other persons in the execution of the warrant, and to deliver the accused, subject to the provisions of this chapter, to the duly authorized agent of the demanding state.
(L. 1953 p. 425 § 8)
